pi_items.metadata_value: Cloud Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rancher_env externalname_dns_routing task by confirming that the expected target namespaces (core-data, legacy-apps, rogue-ns) and the Postgres database service expected external name (postgres-primary.core-data.svc.cluster.local) are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected namespaces and FQDN explicitly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
